name: NFDI
description: National Research Data Infrastructure (NFDI) profile for recording consortium affiliations and grant funding information.
ExpectedUse: Documentation of NFDI consortium involvement and funding acknowledgments for German research data infrastructure initiatives.

Properties.Name: nfdiConsortia
Properties.Title: NFDI Consortium
Properties.Description: NFDI (National Research Data Infrastructure) consortium name or identifier indicating membership or affiliation.

Properties.Name: grantNumber
Properties.Title: Grant Number
Properties.Description: Grant award number or identifier assigned by a funding organization to a research project.
